# ScanTrace v0.5.0

Highlights
- Breaking: remove SCANTRACE_DB; standardize on DB_PATH=/var/lib/scantrace/scantrace.db
- Features: Slack review filters; blocklist export with CIDR grouping
- Ops: systemd unit, install scripts, CAP_NET_BIND_SERVICE
- Docs: INSTALL/.env updates; status/queries guidance
- Fixes: syslog ingest robustness; WAN enrichment toggle

Upgrade
- Set DB_PATH in .env
- mkdir -p /var/lib/scantrace && mv existing DB if needed
- systemctl daemon-reload && systemctl restart scantrace-agent

See CHANGELOG.md for details.
